stemHtml: Which of the following is a potential hazard associated with the assessment of ice accretion by a pilot?

options.a: With hoar frost the aerodynamic contour of the aerofoil appears to be unchanged.
options.b: During flight, mixed ice is invisible on white surfaces.
options.c: Rime ice covers the fuselage on all sides, preventing detection.
options.d: Clear ice accretes mainly on the trailing edges of aircraft parts.
